title: Sretni umiru dvaput
actors: Nikola-Kole Angelovski, Pavle Vuisic, Snezana Niksic
plot: A masterpiece of Yugoslav cinema. Somewhere in Bosnia in 1943 between the fourth and fifth enemy offensives column partisans withdrew across a river to free territory. At the moment of crossing the river, a group of Chetniks sudde...
